name: session-metrics
description: Parses Claude Code JSONL logs to produce per-turn token/cost/cache breakdowns. Multi-format export (text/JSON/CSV/MD/HTML) with 5-hour session blocks, weekly roll-up, session duration & burn rate, hour-of-day + weekday punchcard, subagent → parent-prompt token attribution, pluggable chart libraries (Highcharts/uPlot/Chart.js/none), and 9-category turn waste classification (productive/retry/cache/reasoning/file-reread/verbose/dead-end/subagent — stacked bar + drill-down cards in dashboard). HTML timeline includes idle-gap dividers, model-switch dividers, truncated-response badges, cache-break badges, Turn Character column, and per-turn drawer with data-driven classification explanation. --compare-run spawns two headless claude -p sessions for a one-command A/B benchmark; --compare renders IFEval pass-rate + ratio heatmap from existing JSONLs. Zero network by default, stdlib-only Python.
